scope: Diagnose the HTTP-200/0-byte failure, find the correct API shape, and locate a real openly-fetchable rail artifact.
root_causes: Wrong API shape: OGD JSON is addressed by query param (?dataset=<id>), not a path segment (/ogd/json/<id>). The path form returns HTTP 200 with an EMPTY body, so a status-only check passed on nothing.
Fictional ids: OGD_verkehr_ein_VERK_1 / OGD_verkehr_gut_GUET_1 are not in the catalogue.

api_shape_confirmed.example_working_nonrail: OGD_gvd_waren_GVD_W_2 (inland waterway) returns real JSON manifest with CSV resources

catalogue_finding: data.statistik.gv.at OGD has NO rail dataset. Full catalogue (~315 datasets) checked 2026-06-22 contains only road (OGD_gvk_fahrt_2010_*, OGD_gvk_ware_2010_*), inland-waterway (OGD_gvd_waren_*, OGD_gvd_fahrten_*) and road-accident (OGDEXT_UNFALLSRV_*) transport datasets.

rail_open_data_locations.ods_download: statistik.at file downloads (the openly fetchable rail artifacts)
rail_open_data_locations.statcube_login_required: STATcube opendatabase ids desgv_daten_international / desgv_daten (interactive login; not usable unattended)
rail_open_data_locations.rail_passenger: Personenverkehr Schiene published only as STATcube tables/PDF (no .ods/OGD); headline 2024 = 351.4M passengers (+6.9% vs 2023)

landed_artifacts.title: Schienengüterverkehr nach Verkehrsbereich (rail freight by transport segment)

result: API path corrected to ?dataset=, empty-200 now treated as failure, fictional ids removed. Statistik Austria has no rail OGD dataset, so the parser lands 5 real rail .ods files from statistik.at: rail freight + 4 rolling-stock files (locomotives, railcars, freight wagons, passenger carriages). Rail PASSENGER transport and NETWORK length are not openly fetchable (STATcube login / Verkehrsstatistik PDF) -> Eurostat stays primary for those AT features.
